name: design-director
description: Creates strong visual direction, design briefs, design-system guidance, UI composition principles, product storytelling, and iterative polish workflows before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Visual direction, design-system thinking, UI composition, and premium polish for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A focused Codex plugin for frontend design direction: design briefs, visual direction, DESIGN.md source-of-truth files, composition strategy, product storytelling, and final visual polish without installing dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Create a strong visual direction first.
Generate a DESIGN.md for this UI.
Run a premium visual polish pass.
